name: HETEROTOPIC PANCREAS
definition: pancreatic tissue at aberrant sites that lack a vascular / ductal connection to main pancreatic
distribution: intraluminal growth ± central umbilication (= orifice of rudimentary pancreatic duct)
discriminating_features: flat ovoid intramural subepithelial nodule of < 3 cm
intraluminal growth ± central umbilication (= orifice of rudimentary pancreatic duct)
usually homogeneously enhancing mass with attenuation similar to pancreas
occasionally poor enhancement (if pancreatic acini remain a minor component of the mass)

general: flat ovoid intramural subepithelial nodule of < 3 cm
intraluminal growth ± central umbilication (= orifice of rudimentary pancreatic duct)
CT: usually homogeneously enhancing mass with attenuation similar to pancreas
occasionally poor enhancement (if pancreatic acini remain a minor component of the mass)
